title: × carduocirsium khekii
intro: × Carduocirsium khekii, also known as Khekii thistle, is a rare and endangered species of thistle native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Khekii thistle include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Khekii thistle is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, although modern preparations may also include extracts and capsules for convenience and standardized dosing.
